en_title: Spider-Noir: Every (Kinda, Sorta) Easter Egg and Comics Reference That We Found
cn_title: 《暗影蜘蛛侠》全彩蛋与漫画致敬盘点
summary: 《暗影蜘蛛侠》是近半个世纪来首部真人蜘蛛侠剧集，现已上线流媒体。IGN整理了剧中所有彩蛋与漫画原著致敬内容，虽然数量不及MCU电影，但仍有不少隐藏惊喜值得一找。

paragraphs.en: This article contains spoilers for the full season of Spider-Noir, which is available on Prime Video and MGM+ now.
paragraphs.cn: 本文包含《暗影蜘蛛侠》全季剧透，该剧现已在Prime Video和MGM+上线。

paragraphs.en: Spider-Noir, the first live-action Spider-Man (well, The Spider) series in nearly half a century, dropped in full on MGM+ earlier this week, followed hot on its heels by Prime Video. And as you'd expect, the eight episodes presented both in black and white and color are chock-full of Easter eggs for the comics that… Well now, hold on a second: No, they aren't.
paragraphs.cn: 《暗影蜘蛛侠》是近半个世纪以来首部真人蜘蛛侠（嗯，确切说是「The Spider」）剧集，本周早些时候在MGM+全季上线，紧接着登陆Prime Video。如你所料，这八集既有黑白版本也有彩色版本，里面塞满了对漫画原著的彩蛋……等等，先别急：其实并没有。

paragraphs.en: In fact, unlike your run of the mill MCU or DCU movie that will send you running to the closest fan wiki, Spider-Noir is almost doggedly set in its own universe, mercifully (mostly) free of the hints and teases and eye-popping character names that usually send Spider-Man fans going gaga to explain what the future holds. See, for example, the animated Disney+ series Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man, which gave every single character a Marvel Comics canon identity, from the scientists in charge of Peter Parker's intern class to a random security guard's name tag. Instead, this detective story won't make you comb every frame for clues…
paragraphs.cn: 事实上，跟那些动不动就让你赶紧打开Wiki查资料的MCU或DCU电影不同，《暗影蜘蛛侠》几乎是固执地把故事设定在自己的独立宇宙里，谢天谢地，它（基本上）没有那些暗示、铺垫和让蜘蛛侠粉丝狂热推演未来剧情的角色名字。举个反例，Disney+的动画剧集《Your Friendly Neighborhood 蜘蛛侠》就给每个角色都安排了漫威漫画里的正史身份，从负责Peter Parker实习项目的科学家，到某个保安胸前名牌上的名字。相比之下，这部侦探故事不会让你逐帧寻找线索……

paragraphs.en: …for the most part. While it's hard to characterize everything we list below as an Easter egg (is an Easter egg really just a setting or a character name?), there are interesting riffs on the comics classics that we do get, including at least one deep cut character that curiously replaces another, and a portmanteau of sorts for another Spidey villain.
paragraphs.cn: ……起码大部分时候不会。虽然很难把下面列举的所有内容都称为彩蛋（一个设定或者一个角色名能算彩蛋吗？），但剧中确实有一些对漫画经典的有趣致敬，包括至少一个冷门角色奇怪地顶替了另一个角色，还有一个像是两个蜘蛛侠反派合体的混合产物。

paragraphs.en: So with that in mind, let's get into every Easter egg and comic book character we found in Spider-Noir. And if you found something we missed? It would be the cat's pajamas if you let us know in the comments below, see?
paragraphs.cn: 话不多说，咱们来盘点《暗影蜘蛛侠》中所有的彩蛋和漫画角色。如果你发现了我们漏掉的东西，那可真是太棒了，欢迎在下方评论区告诉我们，懂吧？

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, in Another Spider-Verse…
paragraphs.cn: 「与此同时，另一个蜘蛛宇宙……」

paragraphs.en: As soon as the premiere episode, "Step Into My Office," opens, The Spider is swinging through the city and delivering the following lines of narration:
paragraphs.cn: 首集《Step Into My Office》一开场，The Spider就一边在城市间荡来荡去，一边念出这段旁白：

paragraphs.en: "Someone once asked me what universe this was. Strange question, it stuck with me all these years later. All I could say for sure was it was the only one I knew of. And that was true then as it is now."
paragraphs.cn: 「曾经有人问我，这是哪个宇宙。奇怪的问题，多年来我一直记着。我能确定的只有一点：这是我所知道的唯一一个宇宙。当时如此，现在依然如此。」

paragraphs.en: In case you're wondering, nobody shows up to recruit live-action Spider-Noir to the Spider-Society. There's no further explanation of what this line is, or what it means. It's almost an anti-Easter egg in a way as it leads nowhere and explains nothing. Who asked Ben Reilly (Nicolas Cage) this question? Why did they ask him? Is it something we'll get to see in Beyond the Spider-Verse, whenever that actually comes out in theaters?
paragraphs.cn: 如果你在想：没有，没人来招募真人版蜘蛛侠加入Spider-Society蜘蛛侠协会。剧中没有进一步解释这句台词是什么，也没说它意味着什么。某种意义上这几乎是个「反向彩蛋」——它没有引向任何地方，也没有解释任何事情。是谁问了Ben Reilly（尼古拉斯·凯奇饰）这个问题？他们为什么这么问？这是我们将在《Beyond the 蜘蛛宇宙》（无论它何时真正上映）里看到的内容吗？

paragraphs.en: 'Someone once asked me what universe this was. Strange question...'
paragraphs.cn: 「曾经有人问我这是哪个宇宙。奇怪的问题……」

paragraphs.en: Maybe! But as is, this is in here to explicitly state this is none of the previous movie universes involving Tobey Maguire, Andrew Garfield, or Tom Holland. And neither is it connected to the Spider-Verse movies. Spider-Noir is an entirely different universe, and entirely disconnected from the rest.
paragraphs.cn: 也许吧！但就目前来看，这句话明确表示本剧不属于之前任何由托比·马奎尔、安德鲁·加菲尔德或汤姆·霍兰德参演的电影宇宙，也跟《蜘蛛宇宙》系列电影没有关联。《暗影蜘蛛侠》是一个完全独立的宇宙，与其他作品完全切断。

paragraphs.en: The Daily Bugle
paragraphs.cn: 《号角日报》（The 号角日报）

paragraphs.en: Neither a character nor an Easter egg (you can see a theme here, right?), but as The Spider swings through NYC, we pass by a newsstand stocked with the Daily Bugle, the paper Peter Parker famously takes pictures for and J. Jonah Jameson is the editor of in the regular Spider-Man universe. Neither Peter nor Jonah appears here, but the Bugle is – we discover – the paper that fired Robbie Robertson (Lamorne Morris), and where he desperately would like his job back.
paragraphs.cn: 这既不是一个角色也不是一个彩蛋（看出主题了吧？），但当The Spider在纽约街头荡来荡去时，我们经过一个报刊亭，上面摆着《号角日报》——也就是常规蜘蛛侠宇宙里Peter Parker给它拍照、J. Jonah Jameson担任主编的那家报纸。Peter和Jameson都没在剧中出场，但《号角日报》——我们发现——正是解雇了Robbie Robertson（Lamorne Morris饰）的那家报社，他在剧中拼命想要回那份工作。

paragraphs.en: "With Great Power Comes Great Responsibility"
paragraphs.cn: 「能力越大，责任越大」

paragraphs.en: You probably know this one, right? Still in that opening montage, as The Spider stares at the grave of his lost love Ruby L. Williams (who, to the point we made above, is not a character from the comics), he says that someone once told him, "With great power comes great responsibility."
paragraphs.cn: 这句你大概知道吧？还是在开场蒙太奇里，The Spider凝视着已逝爱人Ruby L. Williams的墓碑（呼应上文，她不是漫画里的角色），说有人曾告诉他：「能力越大，责任越大。」

paragraphs.en: A nerd's favorite fact? Stan Lee originally wrote, "With great power there must also come – great responsibility," back in Amazing Fantasy #15, the book that introduced Spider-Man. But over time it's changed to what Ben says here, a phrase intrinsically tied to Spidey.
paragraphs.cn: 一条漫迷最爱的冷知识：斯坦·李（斯坦·李）当年在《Amazing Fantasy》第15期（也就是蜘蛛侠首次登场的那一期）里写的原版是「拥有巨大的能力，也必须——承担巨大的责任」。但随着时间推移，这句话演变成了Ben在剧中所说的版本，一句已经与蜘蛛侠密不可分的台词。

paragraphs.en: Ben Reilly (Nicolas Cage)
paragraphs.cn: Ben Reilly（尼古拉斯·凯奇饰）

paragraphs.en: We should probably mention that Nicolas Cage is playing Ben Reilly – not Peter Parker. In the comics, Ben is the clone of Peter Parker, and has taken on various identities from Scarlet Spider to Chasm. But in this case, Ben is likely not a clone (there's no indication of that in this show) but rather a way to make him distinct from Peter in the movies. Also of note: In the animated Spider-Verse movies, Cage does voice Peter Parker as Spider-Man Noir, who is different from The Spider. Confusing!
paragraphs.cn: 我们大概得提一下：尼古拉斯·凯奇饰演的是Ben Reilly，而不是Peter Parker。在漫画里，Ben是Peter Parker的克隆体，曾以猩红蜘蛛（猩红蜘蛛）、Chasm等多种身份登场。但在本剧中，Ben大概不是克隆体（剧中没有任何暗示），而更像是为了与电影里的Peter做出区分。值得一提的是：在动画《蜘蛛侠：平行宇宙》系列电影里，凯奇也曾为Peter Parker版本的暗影蜘蛛侠（暗影蜘蛛侠）配音，那个角色与本剧的The Spider是两回事。够混乱的吧！

paragraphs.en: Standard Oil Company
paragraphs.cn: 标准石油公司（标准石油公司）

paragraphs.en: This is more of a "real life" Easter egg than anything, but also in the premiere Ben tracks a man he's been following to the Standard Oil Company. In the real world, Standard Oil was a monopoly that was broken up by anti-trust laws in 1911, with some companies retaining the name, including the Standard Oil Company of New York. That company was absorbed into another company in 1931, and according to a newspaper Ben is reading in the premiere, the events of the show begin around October 11, 1933. Somebody call Movie Goofs!
paragraphs.cn: 这更像是一个「现实生活」彩蛋，但首集中Ben追踪的目标男子最终去了标准石油公司。在现实世界中，标准石油公司原本是个垄断巨头，1911年因反垄断法被拆分，部分子公司沿用了原名，包括纽约标准石油公司。该公司于1931年被并入另一家公司。而根据Ben在首集翻阅的报纸，剧情大约从1933年10月11日左右开始。这穿帮的，赶紧打电话给电影穿帮镜头网！

paragraphs.en: Robbie Robertson (Lamorne Morris)
paragraphs.cn: Robbie Robertson（Lamorne Morris饰）

paragraphs.en: Lamorne Morris's newspaperman is a classic comic book character, usually depicted as the long-suffering editor of the Daily Bugle and voice of reason tempering J. Jonah Jameson's frequent anti-Spider-Man rants.
paragraphs.cn: Lamorne Morris饰演的这位报人是漫画中的经典角色，通常被描绘成《号角日报》里饱受折磨的编辑，是制衡J. Jonah Jameson那些反蜘蛛侠咆哮的理性声音。

paragraphs.en: Robbie was played by Hilly Hicks in the 1970s live-action Spider-Man show, and by Bill Nunn in Sam Raimi's trilogy of films.
paragraphs.cn: Robbie曾在1970年代的真人版《蜘蛛侠》剧集中由Hilly Hicks饰演，在山姆·雷米（山姆·雷米）的三部曲电影中由Bill Nunn饰演。

paragraphs.en: …And interestingly, Robbie's full name is Joe "Robbie" Robertson – though it isn't until he gets his job back in the final episode that we see his real name displayed on his desk's nameplate.
paragraphs.cn: ……有意思的是，Robbie的全名其实是Joe「Robbie」Robertson——但直到最后一集他重获工作时，我们才在他办公桌的名牌上看到他的真名。

paragraphs.en: Cat Hardy (Li Jun Li)
paragraphs.cn: Cat Hardy（Li Jun Li饰）

paragraphs.en: While she doesn't steal anything and doesn't have bad luck powers, the femme fatale at the center of Spider-Noir is Li Jun Li's Cat Hardy, which is a combination of Felicia Hardy and her anti-hero name, Black Cat. In the comics, Felicia is basically Catwoman to Spider-Man's Batman, to the point that they have an on-again, off-again romantic relationship. In Spider-Noir, it's the same with Ben and Cat, who get together briefly… Only to break up.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然她没偷过任何东西，也没有「坏运气」超能力，但本剧中心的蛇蝎美人是Li Jun Li饰演的Cat Hardy——这个名字是Felicia Hardy与她的反英雄代号黑猫（黑猫）的合体。在漫画中，Felicia对蜘蛛侠基本就像猫女（猫女）对蝙蝠侠那样，两人有着分分合合的恋爱关系。《暗影蜘蛛侠》里也是如此，Ben和Cat短暂在一起过……然后又分手了。

paragraphs.en: Ben's Spider-Sense seems to happen when he's either getting closer to the heart of a mystery, or in proximity to one of his old army buddies who were also experimented on. "
paragraphs.cn: 「Ben的蜘蛛感应似乎只在他接近谜团核心时，或者靠近那些同样被做过实验的老战友时才会触发。」

paragraphs.en: Spider-Sense
paragraphs.cn: 蜘蛛感应（Spider-Sense）

paragraphs.en: They don't really explain this at any point in the show, but Ben Reilly – like the rest of the Spider-Mans – has spider-sense. In the comics and some of the movies, that's the little Peter tingle that lets him know when there's danger. Instead, in the show it seems to happen when Ben is either getting closer to the heart of a mystery, or in proximity to one of his old army buddies who were also experimented on and given fantastic powers. Basically, Ben gets a weird feeling on the back of his neck, the scene shifts, and sometimes he gets visions of the others with powers. That's his Spider-Sense tingling!
paragraphs.cn: 剧中从未真正解释这一点，但Ben Reilly——和其他所有蜘蛛侠一样——拥有蜘蛛感应。在漫画和部分电影中，这是Peter那种在危险来临时的小小刺痛感。然而在本剧中，蜘蛛感应似乎只在Ben接近谜团核心时，或者靠近那些同样被做过实验、获得了超能力的老战友时才会触发。具体来说，Ben的后颈会涌起一种奇怪的感觉，画面随之切换，有时他还能看见其他超能者的幻象。这就是他蜘蛛感应在响啦！

paragraphs.en: Flint Marko (Jack Huston)
paragraphs.cn: Flint Marko（Jack Huston饰）

paragraphs.en: Jack Huston's Flint Marko is one of those guys who got experimented on, and is slowly turning into a man made of sand. A "sandman," if you will. In the comics, Flint Marko is able to change his body into different sand constructs, which is not what we get here; it's more some bad psoriasis and strong sand fists. More importantly, particularly in the third Raimi movie and occasionally in the comics, Marko is portrayed as a tragic villain who is trying to do the right thing even when he's forced into crime – which is exactly what happens here on Spider-Noir.
paragraphs.cn: Jack Huston饰演的Flint Marko也是被做过实验的人之一，正逐渐变成一个沙人。也就是「沙人（沙人）」——如果你愿意这么叫的话。在漫画里，Flint Marko能够把自己的身体变成各种不同形态的沙构造体，但这一点在剧中没有体现；他在剧中更像是得了严重的牛皮癣，外加一双强力沙拳。更重要的是，尤其是在山姆·雷米第三部电影中以及部分漫画里，Marko被刻画成一个悲剧反派——即便被迫犯罪也想做正确的事——这正是《暗影蜘蛛侠》里他的形象。

paragraphs.en: Organic Web Shooters
paragraphs.cn: 有机蛛丝发射器（Organic Web Shooters）

paragraphs.en: More of a clarification than anything: Since Ben Reilly's origin is he was bit by a guy whose DNA was fused with spider DNA, he has organic webshooters, a la Tobey Maguire, versus the mechanical web-shooters of Garfield, Holland (well, up until whatever happens in Spider-Man: Brand New Day, of course), and in (most of) the comics. Also if you were wondering, in the Spider-Man Noir comics, Peter is bitten by a spider that escapes from a spider idol in a warehouse, and is given his powers by a spider god.
paragraphs.cn: 这更多是个说明：由于Ben Reilly的起源是被一个DNA与蜘蛛DNA融合的人咬到，所以他拥有有机蛛丝发射器，跟托比·马奎尔版蜘蛛侠一样；而Garfield、Holland（嗯，至少在《蜘蛛侠: Brand New Day》发生任何变化之前）以及（大部分）漫画里的蜘蛛侠都是机械式发射器。顺便说一句，在《暗影蜘蛛侠》原版漫画里，Peter是被一只从仓库蜘蛛神像里逃出来的蜘蛛咬到，能力是由一位蜘蛛神所赋予的。

paragraphs.en: Tombstone (Abraham Popoola)
paragraphs.cn: Tombstone（Abraham Popoola饰）

paragraphs.en: The belle of Spider-Man's 2026, as he'll be appearing in Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man Season 2 and Spider-Man: Brand New Day, the character Lonnie Lincoln, aka Tombstone, appears here too, played by Abraham Popoola. And he sort of has nothing to do with any other iteration of the character? Usually Tombstone is an albino gangster with nearly unbreakable skin and sharpened teeth. Here, Lonnie has some sort of crab-type armor and markings, but no different coloration. Also they don't call him Tombstone?
paragraphs.cn: 蜘蛛侠2026年的当红角色——他将在《Your Friendly Neighborhood 蜘蛛侠》第二季和《蜘蛛侠: Brand New Day》中亮相——Lonnie Lincoln，也就是Tombstone（墓碑），也在本剧中由Abraham Popoola饰演登场。但他跟该角色的其他任何版本几乎毫无关系？通常Tombstone被设定为一个白化病黑帮分子，皮肤近乎刀枪不入，牙齿尖利。而在剧中，Lonnie穿着某种螃蟹类铠甲、身上有相应纹路，但肤色没有任何特别。剧里也不叫他Tombstone？

paragraphs.en: Silvermane (Brendan Gleeson)
paragraphs.cn: Silvermane（Brendan Gleeson饰）

paragraphs.en: Another character who doesn't have a ton to do with his comic book counterpart, Brendan Gleeson's (Irish) Silvermane has a stripe of grey in his hair, and like the comic book character is a mob boss. But Silvermane is usually depicted as an old (Italian) man with a robot body and a (mostly) human head. Mind you, when he was first introduced he was a regular Maggia (the Marvel Comics version of the Mafia) mob boss with silver hair, hence the name. But other than "mob boss," there's no real connection here, nor does this Silvermane have any special powers. Or robot parts.
paragraphs.cn: 又一个跟漫画原型几乎没啥关系的角色：Brendan Gleeson饰演的（爱尔兰版）Silvermane头发上有一道灰色条纹，像漫画角色一样是个黑帮老大。但漫画里的Silvermane通常被描绘成一个有着机器人身体和（大部分时候）人类头颅的（意大利老人）。话说回来，他刚登场时确实只是一个有着银发的普通Maggia（漫威漫画里的黑手党版本）黑帮头子，名字由此而来。但除了「黑帮老大」这一点，本剧的Silvermane和漫画版没有真正联系，也没有任何特殊能力。也没有机器人零件。

paragraphs.en: Megawatt (Andrew Lewis Caldwell)
paragraphs.cn: Megawatt（Andrew Lewis Caldwell饰）

paragraphs.en: Here's the oddest one, saved for last. In the comics, Megawatt is an Australian convict with electrical powers who was first introduced in 1993's Spider-Man Unlimited #2, and whose real name is Dirk Leydon. On screen, Andrew Lewis Caldwell plays the baddie, a failed actor who now can drain and shoot electricity, giving him the lights and stage he's always wanted. He does call himself Megawatt by the end of the season, but his name is spelled Dirk Leyden on the show. Even curiouser, he's not Electro, the bad guy with electric powers far more associated with Spider-Man – who often teams up with Sandman and others in the team the Sinister Six. Anyway, great news for anyone who bagged and boarded Spider-Man Unlimited #2 – that's probably jumping up at least 50 cents in sell value!
paragraphs.cn: 最古怪的一个角色压轴登场。在漫画里，Megawatt是一个有电力超能力的澳大利亚囚犯，首次登场于1993年的《蜘蛛侠 Unlimited》第2期，本名为Dirk Leydon。剧中由Andrew Lewis Caldwell饰演，他是一个失败的演员，如今能够吸取并发射电力，让他获得了梦寐以求的灯光与舞台。剧集末尾他确实自称Megawatt，但他在剧中的名字拼写成了Dirk Leyden。更奇怪的是，他并不是电光人（电光人）——那个跟蜘蛛侠关联更深、经常与沙人等人组队邪恶六人组（邪恶六人组）的电力反派。总之，对那些当年把《蜘蛛侠 Unlimited》第2期收藏起来的粉丝来说是个好消息——这本漫画的售价大概能涨至少50美分！

paragraphs.en: What did you think of Spider-Noir? Did you catch any Easter eggs that we missed? Let's discuss in the comments!
paragraphs.cn: 你觉得《暗影蜘蛛侠》怎么样？有没有捕捉到我们漏掉的彩蛋？欢迎在评论区一起讨论！

paragraphs.en: You can chat with Alex Zalben on BlueSky @azalben.bsky.social, or find him regularly yapping on the Comic Book Club podcast.
paragraphs.cn: 你可以在BlueSky上跟Alex Zalben交流：@azalben.bsky.social，或者在《Comic Book Club》播客中常听到他唠叨。

opus_summary: 《暗影蜘蛛侠》是近半世纪首部真人蜘蛛侠剧集，现已在Prime Video和MGM+上线。IGN整理了剧中所有彩蛋与漫画致敬，藏着许多值得粉丝挖掘的细节。
